character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: Leader of the crew, involved in planning and decision-making during the crisis. Reacts to the situation with urgency and authority.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: Feels guilt for leading the group into peril. Shaken by the events and the danger faced.

character_dossiers.name: Hunter
character_dossiers.biography: Participates in the plan to retrieve supplies. Demonstrates physical strength by pulling a good oar.

character_dossiers.name: Jim Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: Absent from the group, presumed to have gone ashore. The crew expresses concern for his safety.

character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Leader of the mutineers, orchestrates actions from the shore. His presence is inferred through the crew's awareness of his influence.

character_dossiers.name: Redruth
character_dossiers.biography: Assigned to guard the ship's galley with muskets. Part of the crew's defensive strategy.

character_dossiers.name: Joyce
character_dossiers.biography: Assists in loading the jolly-boat with supplies. Collaborates with the narrator on the plan.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Hands
character_dossiers.biography: Coxswain of the ship, addressed by the captain as a key figure aboard.
